reviewer_controlled_promotion_checklist_.check: Confirm rehearsal remains inactive and evidence-only.

unresolved_hold_carry_forward_conditions.carry_forward_reason: Freshness reminders must stay visible until reviewer closes the hold.

pre_promotion_source_freshness_reminders.reminder: Recheck official public source dates before any later promotion decision.
pre_promotion_source_freshness_reminders.freshness_reference: Last verified public source anchor date in plan

agent_notification_placeholders.message_template: This is an inactive rehearsal record. Do not activate, promote, crawl live sources, mutate DevHub state, or claim official completion.

monitoring_watch_rows.watch_condition: Source hash, guidance date, or official workflow text changes before reviewer decision.

validation_commands.purpose: Run deterministic PP&D validation without live crawl, authentication, mutation, or private artifacts.
